Shvil Application

Android Mobile App Development Data Management Geolocation Java Java Archive XML
H
Hila Shmuel <>
Shvil
Fri, 18 Jan 2013 23:11:17 +0200
The Shvil app features multiple activities including a main activity for navigation, a map activity for exploring locations, and a profile activity where users can manage their details. It incorporates functionalities such as writing and editing notes, sending messages, and displaying user data in a list format. Additionally, users can share notes and report problems related to their entries. This app utilizes location services and external storage permissions to enhance its mapping and note management capabilities.
